revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CO2%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CO2%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
{{High-use}}
{{COinS safe|n}}

== Usage ==
This template is used to display subcripts of numbers of molecules and superscripts of ionic charges in chemical compounds.
*{{tlx|CO2}} gives: {{CO2}}
*{{tlx|CO2|link{{=}}yes}} gives: {{CO2|link=yes}}

==Template data==
{{Template data header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"link": {}
	}
}
</templatedata>

== See also ==
{{List of chemical compound symbol templates}}
* {{tl|Chem2}}
* {{clc|Miscellaneous chemical symbol templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||

}}</includeonly>

<noinclude>
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Chemical compound symbol templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
